macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: U.S. and Canadian Stock Markets Tumble Amid U.S.-Israel Attacks on Iran
items.summary: The S&P/TSX composite fell 136.80 points to 34,203.19, while U.S. indices dropped sharply: Dow down 437.18 points to 48,540.74, S&P 500 down 50.87 to 6,828.01, and Nasdaq down 163.15 to 22,505.06. Oil surged $5.20 to $72.22 per barrel and gold rose $115.80 to $5,363.70 due to Strait of Hormuz concerns.

items.title: U.S. Equity Leadership Shifts to Small-Cap Value and Cyclical Sectors in 2026
items.summary: Small-cap value stocks lead YTD at +8.9% (Russell 2000 Value), while large-cap growth lags at -4.8%; Energy and Materials sectors up 25.0% and 17.8%, but Tech down 5.5%. Equal-weighted S&P 500 up 7.1% YTD vs. 0.7% for cap-weighted index.

items.title: 30-Year Mortgage Rates Hit 3.5-Year Low at 5.98%
items.summary: Average U.S. 30-year fixed mortgage rate dropped below 6% to 5.98% last week, lowest since September 2022, boosting housing affordability outlook amid falling 10-year Treasury yields.

items.title: Markets Price in 25-50bps Fed Rate Cuts This Year Amid Narrowing Yield Differentials
items.summary: Weaker U.S. dollar driven by higher hedging and narrowing 2-year yield differentials with peers like Japan and Australia, where hikes are expected; contrasts with Fed cut pricing.

items.title: S&P 500 Q4 2025 Earnings Growth at 14.2%
items.summary: S&P 500 companies reported 14.2% earnings growth for Q4 2025.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs See Major Net Outflows on March 2
items.summary: Ten Bitcoin ETFs recorded a net outflow of 548 BTC ($35.9 million), while nine Ethereum ETFs saw 12,307 ETH ($23.75 million) exit. In contrast, the SOL ETF had a net inflow of 17,941 SOL ($1.49 million).

items.title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies Boosts ETH Holdings to 4.47 Million Tokens
items.summary: Bitmine announced staked ETH holdings of 3,040,483 tokens worth $6.0 billion at $1,976 per ETH, making it the largest ETH treasury globally. The company is advancing its MAVAN staking solution for launch in early 2026 amid geopolitical tensions.

items.title: Bitcoin Trading Firmer but Trapped in Range on March 2
items.summary: March Bitcoin futures prices rose in early U.S. trading despite market volatility, remaining confined to a trading range according to technical analysis.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Canada Funds AI for Drone Weather Data Collection
items.summary: Government of Canada announces investment in Landing Zones Canada via Regional Artificial Intelligence Initiative to develop AI technologies for Remotely Piloted Aircraft Systems, improving atmospheric weather data collection, reducing waste from single-use balloons, and supporting 12 jobs.

items.title: AI Advances in Healthcare Highlighted: Regulatory Clearances and Trials
items.summary: Weekly update covers FDA 510(k) for Qure.ai's chest X-ray AI, Optellum's lung cancer prediction tools, MindRank's obesity drug trials with 92% and 88% accuracies, and Kobe University's privacy-conscious acromegaly screening AI.

items.title: MIT Experts Discuss AI's Impact on Work and Productivity
items.summary: MIT researchers note AI tools like CheXbert match two-thirds of radiologists in X-ray diagnosis but warn of productivity frictions; highlight effective uses in data center cooling at Google and AI voice calls for deaf drivers in China.

items.title: Gartner Predicts 50% of HR Activities AI-Automated by 2030
items.summary: 92% of HR leaders have implemented AI in last six months; experts urge balancing technical upskilling with preserving human-centric skills like empathy to avoid erosion amid workforce transformation.

items.title: Mozilla Offers $500K for AI Projects Strengthening Democracy
items.summary: Democracy x AI funding seeks technologists building AI for information verification, institutional transparency, and civic space protection; 10 projects at $50K each, deadline March 16, 2025.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Indie World Showcase Announced for March 3
items.summary: Nintendo has announced its Indie World Showcase airing March 3, 2026, at 6:00 A.M. PT, featuring 15 minutes of news and updates on indie games for Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch.

items.title: Digital Extremes Announces Warframe for Nintendo Switch 2
items.summary: During Devstream 193 on March 2, 2026, Digital Extremes revealed Warframe is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 alongside other updates.

items.title: PC Gamer Highlights Five New Steam Releases
items.summary: PC Gamer spotlights recent Steam games including New Heights (Feb 27), Fear Effect 2: Retro Helix (Feb 28), and Emberbane (Feb 25) as noteworthy indie titles.

items.title: March 2026 Game Releases Roundup Published
items.summary: Multiple outlets detail March's big releases like Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered and World of Warcraft: Midnight on March 3, with more including WWE 2K26 and Super Mario Bros. Wonder Switch 2 Edition later in the month.

items.title: Nintendo UK Lists Upcoming Switch 2 Titles for March
items.summary: Nintendo UK announces March releases for Switch 2 including FATAL FRAME II: Crimson Butterfly REMAKE (March 12), Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection (March 13), WWE 2K26 (March 13), and Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage (March 26).

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Defense News Unveils Inaugural 2026 Tech Disruptors List
items.summary: Defense News announced its first 2026 Tech Disruptors list, honoring executives, engineers, founders, and leaders transforming defense technology through innovations in autonomous systems, cybersecurity, resilient space architectures, advanced manufacturing, and secure cloud infrastructure. The list highlights individuals accelerating technology deployment from concept to operational use amid evolving national security demands.

items.title: World's Top 100 Tech Brands Reach $3.7 Trillion Valuation in 2026
items.summary: The global top 100 technology brands are collectively valued at $3.7 trillion, with nearly 70% of the value held by the four leading US brands. Nvidia emerged as the fastest-growing brand, surging to fifth place after more than doubling its value from 2025.
